page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8t-4x.16xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance designed on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 6462C processor operating at 3.3 GHz. The system provides 64 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, paired with 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

For accelerated workloads, the instance integrates four NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPUs, delivering a combined 96 GB of VRAM. Networking capabilities include a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, facilitating rapid data transfer between nodes or external storage systems.

A key architectural tradeoff is the absence of local storage, as the instance is configured with zero local disk space, requiring external network-attached storage solutions. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the high density of dedicated CPU cores, substantial memory capacity, and quad-GPU configuration position this instance for resource-intensive enterprise workloads that justify the hardware class.

This hardware profile is suited for deep learning, GPU-accelerated data science, large-scale model inference, high-performance computing, and parallel processing tasks that require significant GPU memory and dedicated CPU resources.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8t-4x.16xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 6462C processor running at 3.3 GHz with 64 dedicated physical cores and a single thread per core. The instance is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory and four NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPUs providing a total of 96 GB of VRAM. For connectivity, it offers a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. A notable architectural tradeoff is the complete absence of local storage, necessitating external storage configurations. This high-density hardware profile is qualitatively cost-effective for resource-intensive workloads, making it highly suitable for deep learning, GPU-accelerated data science, large-scale model inference, and high-performance computing tasks requiring dedicated CPU and GPU resources.

tagline: A high-density GPU-accelerated platform featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and quad NVIDIA Ada Lovelace graphics for parallel computing workloads.
